creator: vsasjason@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to John F. Carr from comment #1)

Yup, most likely this is the case, and I also suffer from it (using tmpfs for wrkdir). There's even a patch exists to block tmpfs: https://github.com/freebsd/poudriere/issues/888, but I wasn't able to make it work under current non-devel poudriere.
